purpose: Floating panel anchored to a triggering element. Shows transient supplementary content like a menu, picker, or detail snippet without taking over the screen.
whenToUse: Overflow menus from a Button / IconButton
Detail-on-hover for table cells (rare; avoid for accessibility)
Color pickers, date pickers, dropdown menus
Confirmation prompts for low-risk actions (use Dialog for high-risk)
whenNotToUse: For navigation — use SideNavigation or IconTabBar
When content needs to persist — use a dedicated section, not Popover
doRules: Anchor to the triggering element clearly (arrow / tail)
Provide a close affordance (× or Esc)
Limit content to a single task — Popover should not branch into sub-tasks
Bind fill to sapShellColor, border to sapShell_BorderColor
dontRules: Do not use Popover for forms with > 3 fields — use Dialog
Do not auto-dismiss on hover-out for click-triggered Popovers
Do not use Popover for navigation (use SideNavigation)

layoutGuidance.placement: Place Popover inside a compatible container (Button, IconButton, MenuButton).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for overlay — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
